issue_title: Scrub bar sometimes not reliable on iOS
issue_body_preview:
### Description
When swiping along the scrub bar quickly, the scrub bar visibly moves but reverts back to the original position when letting go. I tested this on a touch-screen Windows and it responded perfectly, so maybe some cross-browser compatibility issues are happening.

Model Name: iPhone
test_description_zh: 在 iOS 设备上打开视频播放器页面，播放视频后，用手指在进度条（scrub bar）上快速滑动拖拽到一个新位置，然后松开手指，观察进度条的位置和视频播放位置的变化。
expected_result_zh: 手指松开后，进度条应停留在用户拖拽释放的位置，视频应从该新位置继续播放，不应出现进度条回弹/恢复到拖拽前原始位置的情况。
